description: Covers AWS fundamentals, EC2 troubleshooting, Auto Scaling configuration, and containerized application traffic management for technical interviews.

Evaluates knowledge of AWS fundamentals, containerized application scaling, EC2 troubleshooting, auto scaling configuration, TCO analysis, and multi-tenant AI platform design for voice interview assessments.
Covers AWS fundamentals, real-time analytics and IoT dashboard design, auto scaling, EC2 troubleshooting, and containerized application traffic management.
